## Runtime.inRange() function

Creates a filter for numeric range (inclusive).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function inRange<T>(min: number | undefined, max: number | undefined, getter: (item: T) => number | undefined): FilterPredicate<T>;
```

[FilterPredicate](./ts-chocolate.runtime.filterpredicate.md)<!-- -->&lt;T&gt;

Filter that matches if value is in range
